text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
252 
PLAN_TYPE 
LABEL: 
Part D Plan Type 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates the type of Part D plan offered by the plan sponsor. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: PLAN_TYPE 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
01 = Health Maintenance Organization (HMO) 

02 = Health Maintenance Organization Point-of-Service (HMO POS) 

04 = Local Preferred Provider Organization
